_comment: WORLD STATE ENGINE - MASTER SCHEMA. The unifying simulation system. Everything derives from this. Per the user's directive: 'If I could only ask the agent to build one more foundational system, it would be this: The World State Engine.' The engine continuously answers: What exists? Who owns it? Who wants it? Who knows about it? Why hasn't it been taken already? What would naturally happen next if the player did nothing? Prime Directive: the player is not spawning content — they are entering a world that is already moving.
core_questions: Why hasn't it been taken already?
What would naturally happen next if the player did nothing?

per_tick: advance ecosystems (apply seasonal state, adjust populations)
advance opportunities (infer new opportunities at aged locations, expire old ones)
advance provenance (record any state changes to artifacts)
advance macro_terrain (perception re-roll for cultivators whose perception changed)
answer player queries (what does the player perceive at their location?)
simulation_loop.player_arrival: When the player arrives at a location, the engine does NOT spawn content; it reveals what already exists according to the player's perception tier.

perception_engine.description: Determines what the player perceives based on cultivation tier.
perception_engine.rule: Perception NEVER changes what exists; it only changes what the player observes. A mortal standing on Ancient God bone sees a mountain; a Core Formation cultivator sees bone; a Spirit Severing cultivator sees god-memory.
perception_engine.no_locked_upgrades: A mortal who later reaches Core Formation will see the truth; the terrain does not change, only understanding does.

objective_nature.description: The ObjectiveNature layer records the TRUE state of everything, independent of perception.
objective_nature.rule: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence.
objective_nature.perception_overlay: PerceptionEngine overlays a filtered view on top of ObjectiveNature.

world_breathes.description: The world changes whether or not the player acts.
examples: Sect leaders die of age or war.
A player who returns 200 years later will barely recognize the world.

xianxia_primitives.description: Xianxia-specific schema primitives added to species, faction_relationships, and opportunities

bloodline_tier.description: Classifies a beast's bloodline purity. Derived from cultivation range, bloodline field, mutations, and intelligence.

fields.has_core: boolean — whether the species condenses an inner core
fields.alchemy_use: string — what the core can be used for in alchemy (or null)

inner_dan_properties.description: Describes a beast's condensed inner core (dan) for alchemy and cultivation purposes.

fields.queen_id: string — species_id of the queen (or null)

hive_mind_anchor.description: Tracks hive-mind swarm linkage for species like the Mosquito Beast.

combat_ai.description: Determines the species' default combat behavior pattern.

fields.qi_modifier: string — description of passive cultivation bonus

spiritual_vein_grade.description: The spiritual vein that powers a faction's territory.

fields.item_id: string — matches item_properties or arsenal ID
fields.name: string

heritage_treasures.description: Heritage treasures owned by the faction.

relationship_metadata.description: Enriched faction relationship data with metadata.

fields.description: string — what karmic consequence this event creates

karmic_weight.description: Measures the karmic weight of an opportunity event.

fields.event_id: string — ID of a related future event or state change

consequences.description: Downstream consequences triggered by this opportunity.
